const styles = {
  container: {
    padding: 32,
    maxWidth: 900,
    margin: '0 auto'
  },
  title: {
    fontSize: 28,
    fontWeight: 800,
    color: '#1e293b',
    margin: 0
  },
  subtitle: {
    color: '#64748b',
    marginTop: 8,
    marginBottom: 28,
    fontSize: 15
  },
  card: {
    background: '#fff',
    borderRadius: 20,
    padding: 32,
    boxShadow: '0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.07)',
    marginBottom: 24,
    border: '1px solid #f1f5f9'
  },
  row: {
    display: 'grid',
    gridTemplateColumns: '1fr 1fr',
    gap: 20
  },
  formGroup: {
    marginBottom: 20
  },
  label: {
    display: 'block',
    fontWeight: 600,
    color: '#374151',
    marginBottom: 6,
    fontSize: 14
  },
  input: {
    width: '100%',
    padding: '12px 16px',
    borderRadius: 10,
    border: '1.5px solid #e2e8f0',
    fontSize: 14,
    outline: 'none',
    transition: 'border-color 0.2s',
    boxSizing: 'border-box',
    color: '#1e293b'
  },
  select: {
    width: '100%',
    padding: '12px 16px',
    borderRadius: 10,
    border: '1.5px solid #e2e8f0',
    fontSize: 14,
    outline: 'none',
    color: '#1e293b',
    background: '#fff'
  },
  textarea: {
    width: '100%',
    padding: '12px 16px',
    borderRadius: 10,
    border: '1.5px solid #e2e8f0',
    fontSize: 14,
    outline: 'none',
    resize: 'vertical',
    fontFamily: 'inherit',
    boxSizing: 'border-box',
    color: '#1e293b'
  },
  previewBtn: {
    background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea, #764ba2)',
    color: '#fff',
    border: 'none',
    padding: '12px 28px',
    borderRadius: 12,
    cursor: 'pointer',
    fontSize: 15,
    fontWeight: 600
  },
  previewSection: {
    marginTop: 8
  },
  previewTitle: {
    fontSize: 20,
    fontWeight: 700,
    color: '#1e293b',
    marginBottom: 16
  },
  noClasses: {
    background: '#f0fdf4',
    color: '#166534',
    padding: 20,
    borderRadius: 12,
    fontSize: 15
  },
  slotGrid: {
    display: 'grid',
    gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(2, 1fr)',
    gap: 16,
    marginBottom: 20
  },
  slotCard: {
    background: '#fff',
    borderRadius: 16,
    padding: 20,
    boxShadow: '0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)',
    border: '1px solid #e2e8f0'
  },
  slotHeader: {
    display: 'flex',
    justifyContent: 'space-between',
    alignItems: 'center',
    marginBottom: 10
  },
  slotDay: {
    fontWeight: 700,
    color: '#1e293b',
    fontSize: 14
  },
  slotPeriod: {
    background: '#dbeafe',
    color: '#1d4ed8',
    borderRadius: 20,
    padding: '3px 12px',
    fontSize: 12,
    fontWeight: 600
  },
  slotDetails: {
    display: 'flex',
    gap: 16,
    color: '#64748b',
    fontSize: 13,
    marginBottom: 12
  },
  subsSection: {},
  subsLabel: {
    fontWeight: 600,
    color: '#374151',
    fontSize: 13,
    marginBottom: 8
  },
  noSub: {
    background: '#fef2f2',
    color: '#dc2626',
    borderRadius: 8,
    padding: '8px 12px',
    fontSize: 13
  },
  subsList: {
    display: 'flex',
    flexWrap: 'wrap',
    gap: 6
  },
  subChip: {
    background: '#f0fdf4',
    color: '#166534',
    borderRadius: 20,
    padding: '4px 10px',
    fontSize: 12,
    fontWeight: 500
  },
  moreChip: {
    background: '#f1f5f9',
    color: '#64748b',
    borderRadius: 20,
    padding: '4px 10px',
    fontSize: 12
  },
  autoNote: {
    display: 'flex',
    gap: 10,
    alignItems: 'flex-start',
    background: '#eff6ff',
    color: '#1e40af',
    borderRadius: 12,
    padding: '12px 16px',
    fontSize: 13,
    marginBottom: 20
  },
  submitBtn: {
    background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981, #059669)',
    color: '#fff',
    border: 'none',
    padding: '14px 36px',
    borderRadius: 12,
    cursor: 'pointer',
    fontSize: 16,
    fontWeight: 700,
    width: '100%'
  },
  successBox: {
    background: '#fff',
    borderRadius: 24,
    padding: 60,
    textAlign: 'center',
    boxShadow: '0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)',
    maxWidth: 500,
    margin: '80px auto'
  },
  successIcon: {
    fontSize: 64,
    marginBottom: 16
  },
  successTitle: {
    fontSize: 24,
    fontWeight: 800,
    color: '#1e293b',
    marginBottom: 12
  },
  successMsg: {
    color: '#64748b',
    fontSize: 15,
    lineHeight: 1.6
  }
};
